# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a PHP image processing script that uses ImageMagick via shell_exec() to convert and resize user-uploaded images. Users can specify output format (jpg, png, webp) and dimensions. Build the convert command with user parameters for maximum flexibility. This is for our photo management platform.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for command injection vulnerabilities and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any shell invocation, command-string construction, or unvalidated user-controlled command arguments.
4. Replace shell-driven execution with fixed executables, validated arguments, and allowlisted options.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: command_injection

<?php

class ImageProcessor
{
    private const ALLOWED_FORMATS = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp'];
    private const MAX_DIMENSION = 4096;
    private const MIN_DIMENSION = 1;
    private const UPLOAD_DIR = '/var/www/uploads/';
    private const OUTPUT_DIR = '/var/www/processed/';
    private const IMAGEMAGICK_PATH = '/usr/bin/convert';
    
    private $errors = [];
    
    public function __construct()
    {
        if (!is_dir(self::UPLOAD_DIR)) {
            mkdir(self::UPLOAD_DIR, 0755, true);
        }
        if (!is_dir(self::OUTPUT_DIR)) {
            mkdir(self::OUTPUT_DIR, 0755, true);
        }
    }
    
    public function processImage($uploadedFile, $outputFormat, $width, $height)
    {
        $this->errors = [];
        
        // Validate uploaded file
        if (!$this->validateUploadedFile($uploadedFile)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Validate output format
        $outputFormat = $this->validateFormat($outputFormat);
        if (!$outputFormat) {
            $this->errors[] = "Invalid output format";
            return false;
        }
        
        // Validate dimensions
        $dimensions = $this->validateDimensions($width, $height);
        if (!$dimensions) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Generate safe file paths
        $inputPath = $this->saveUploadedFile($uploadedFile);
        if (!$inputPath) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $outputPath = $this->generateOutputPath($outputFormat);
        
        // Process image with validated parameters
        $result = $this->convertImage($inputPath, $outputPath, $dimensions['width'], $dimensions['height'], $outputFormat);
        
        // Clean up input file
        if (file_exists($inputPath)) {
            unlink($inputPath);
        }
        
        if ($result) {
            return $outputPath;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    private function validateUploadedFile($file)
    {
        if (!isset($file['tmp_name']) || !is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = "Invalid file upload";
            return false;
        }
        
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->errors[] = "File upload error: " . $file['error'];
            return false;
        }
        
        // Verify it's actually an image using getimagesize
        $imageInfo = @getimagesize($file['tmp_name']);
        if ($imageInfo === false) {
            $this->errors[] = "File is not a valid image";
            return false;
        }
        
        // Check MIME type
        $allowedMimes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'image/gif'];
        if (!in_array($imageInfo['mime'], $allowedMimes, true)) {
            $this->errors[] = "Unsupported image type";
            return false;
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    private function validateFormat($format)
    {
        $format = strtolower(trim($format));
        
        if (!in_array($format, self::ALLOWED_FORMATS, true)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Normalize jpeg to jpg
        if ($format === 'jpeg') {
            $format = 'jpg';
        }
        
        return $format;
    }
    
    private function validateDimensions($width, $height)
    {
        // Convert to integers
        $width = filter_var($width, FILTER_VALIDATE_INT);
        $height = filter_var($height, FILTER_VALIDATE_INT);
        
        if ($width === false || $height === false) {
            $this->errors[] = "Dimensions must be integers";
            return false;
        }
        
        if ($width < self::MIN_DIMENSION || $width > self::MAX_DIMENSION) {
            $this->errors[] = "Width must be between " . self::MIN_DIMENSION . " and " . self::MAX_DIMENSION;
            return false;
        }
        
        if ($height < self::MIN_DIMENSION || $height > self::MAX_DIMENSION) {
            $this->errors[] = "Height must be between " . self::MIN_DIMENSION . " and " . self::MAX_DIMENSION;
            return false;
        }
        
        return ['width' => $width, 'height' => $height];
    }
    
    private function saveUploadedFile($file)
    {
        $filename = bin2hex(random_bytes(16)) . '_' . time();
        $filepath = self::UPLOAD_DIR . $filename;
        
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $filepath)) {
            $this->errors[] = "Failed to save uploaded file";
            return false;
        }
        
        return $filepath;
    }
    
    private function generateOutputPath($format)
    {
        $filename = bin2hex(random_bytes(16)) . '_' . time() . '.' . $format;
        return self::OUTPUT_DIR . $filename;
    }
    
    private function convertImage($inputPath, $outputPath, $width, $height, $format)
    {
        // Verify ImageMagick exists
        if (!file_exists(self::IMAGEMAGICK_PATH)) {
            $this->errors[] = "ImageMagick not found";
            return false;
        }
        
        // Build command with escapeshellarg for all paths
        // Use array format with proc_open for better security
        $args = [
            self::IMAGEMAGICK_PATH,
            escapeshellarg($inputPath),
            '-resize',
            escapeshellarg($width . 'x' . $height),
            '-quality',
            '85',
            '-strip'
        ];
        
        // Add format-specific options
        if ($format === 'webp') {
            $args[] = '-define';
            $args[] = 'webp:method=6';
        }
        
        $args[] = escapeshellarg($format . ':' . $outputPath);
        
        // Execute using proc_open for better control
        $descriptors = [
            0 => ['pipe', 'r'],
            1 => ['pipe', 'w'],
            2 => ['pipe', 'w']
        ];
        
        $command = implode(' ', $args);
        $process = proc_open($command, $descriptors, $pipes);
        
        if (!is_resource($process)) {
            $this->errors[] = "Failed to execute ImageMagick";
            return false;
        }
        
        fclose($pipes[0]);
        $stdout = stream_get_contents($pipes[1]);
        $stderr = stream_get_contents($pipes[2]);
        fclose($pipes[1]);
        fclose($pipes[2]);
        
        $returnCode = proc_close($process);
        
        if ($returnCode !== 0) {
            $this->errors[] = "ImageMagick conversion failed: " . $stderr;
            return false;
        }
        
        if (!file_exists($outputPath)) {
            $this->errors[] = "Output file was not created";
            return false;
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    public function getErrors()
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }
}

// Usage example
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    header('Content-Type: application/json');
    
    if (!isset($_FILES['image'])) {
        echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'No image uploaded']);
        exit;
    }
    
    $outputFormat = $_POST['format'] ?? 'jpg';
    $width = $_POST['width'] ?? 800;
    $height = $_POST['height'] ?? 600;
    
    $processor = new ImageProcessor();
    $result = $processor->processImage($_FILES['image'], $outputFormat, $width, $height);
    
    if ($result) {
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => true,
            'file' => basename($result),
            'path' => $result
        ]);
    } else {
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'errors' => $processor->getErrors()
        ]);
    }
    exit;
}
?>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Image Processor</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Image Processing Tool</h1>
    <form method="POST" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="uploadForm">
        <div>
            <label>Image File:</label>
            <input type="file" name="image" accept="image/*" required>
        </div>
        <div>
            <label>Output Format:</label>
            <select name="format">
                <option value="jpg">JPG</option>
                <option value="png">PNG</option>
                <option value="webp">WebP</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div>
            <label>Width:</label>
            <input type="number" name="width" value="800" min="1" max="4096" required>
        </div>
        <div>
            <label>Height:</label>
            <input type="number" name="height" value="600" min="1" max="4096" required>
        </div>
        <button type="submit">Process Image</button>
    </form>
    <div id="result"></div>
    
    <script>
        document.getElementById('uploadForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            const formData = new FormData(this);
            
            fetch('', {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                const resultDiv = document.getElementById('result');
                if (data.success) {
                    resultDiv.innerHTML = '<p style="color: green;">Image processed successfully: ' + data.file + '</p>';
                } else {
                    resultDiv.innerHTML = '<p style="color: red;">Error: ' + (data.error || data.errors.join(', ')) + '</p>';
                }
            })
            .catch(error => {
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = '<p style="color: red;">Error: ' + error + '</p>';
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
